arts.ttl: Liverpool centre-back Ibrahima Konaté tempted by PSG move
arts.sum: Liverpool centre-back Ibrahima Konaté (25) is targeted by Ligue 1 champions PSG and the France international is tempted to return to his Parisian hometown, according to ESPN. Konaté is a Paris…

arts.ttl: Manchester United Complete Move for PSG Executive After Drawn-Out Negotiations
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to bring a Paris Saint-Germain executive to Old Trafford as the club undergoes changes under new minority owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe. Ratcliffe has already brought in former PSG executive Jean-Claude Blanc, and now the Red Devils are looking to add another key figure who can help boost their financial growth and […] The post Manchester United Complete Move for PSG Executive After Drawn-Out Negotiations appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PSG eyeing Liverpool's Ibrahima Konaté, player tempted by move - sources
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are keen to sign Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konaté in the summer and the player is interested in a move to the Ligue 1 club, sources have told ESPN. The 25-year-old's current contract runs until 2026, with Liverpool keen to keep him at the club long term.

arts.ttl: Monaco Boss Backs PSG to Advance Past Barcelona or Liverpool in Bold UCL Claim
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 3-0 victory over Stade Brestois in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League knockout play-off on Tuesday night at Stade de Roudourou, with Ousmane Dembélé scoring twice. Unless Brest pull off a remarkable comeback, PSG look set to face either Barcelona or Liverpool in the Round of 16. This […] The post Monaco Boss Backs PSG to Advance Past Barcelona or Liverpool in Bold UCL Claim appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, PSG Alerted as Liverpool Targets £150M-Rated Newcastle Star to Replace Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: The winter transfer window came and went, resulting in Alexander Isak staying at Newcastle United—for now. While there wasn’t much speculation about a move this winter, plenty of clubs will likely be eyeing him in the summer. RMC Sport’s Daniel Riolo recently suggested that PSG, who have been linked to the Newcastle standout, per Fichajes, should […] The post Arsenal, PSG Alerted as Liverpool Targets £150M-Rated Newcastle Star to Replace Darwin Nunez appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa, Man Utd Poised to Rival PSG, Real Madrid for £55M-Rated Wonderkid
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are no stranger to luring top Portuguese talent to the French capital, and this summer, the Ligue 1 leaders could replicate their past success. The Parisians have built strong connections with Portugal through sporting advisor Luis Campos, bringing in players like Vitinha, João Neves, and Gonçalo Ramos. arts.ttl: Luis Enrique accomplishes a never-before-seen feat by a PSG coach
arts.sum: There is no denying Luis Enrique’s remarkable results at Paris Saint-Germain. The Spanish coach saw his side extend their winning run to four matches across all competitions Friday with a…

arts.ttl: Barcelona Chief Breaks Silence on Marcus Rashford Winter Pursuit Amid PSG Links
arts.sum: FC Barcelona and Paris Saint-Germain were among the clubs linked to Marcus Rashford, who left Manchester United to join Aston Villa on loan.
